testcase.name: test_individual_rating_fields
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration5_fixes.py:220: in test_individual_rating_fields completed_jobs = [j for j in jobs if j.get("status") == "complete"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_iteration5_fixes.py:220: in <listcomp> completed_jobs = [j for j in jobs if j.get("status") == "complete"] ^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get'
